prompt: A realistic scene inside a tailoring workshop. A tailor is stitching a suit directly onto a single person’s body, adjusting every tiny detail obsessively so it fits that person perfectly. The suit looks unnaturally tight and overly customized. In the background, several other people stand waiting, unable to wear similar suits that hang loosely or don’t fit them at all. Natural lighting, highly realistic, documentary-style photography, no text, no labels, no diagrams. Negative prompt: text, labels, diagrams, charts, graphs, equations, glowing effects, futuristic UI
metaphor: A suit tailored perfectly to one person but unusable for others, representing a model that fits training data but fails to generalize.
